## 🐛 Bug Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

```bash
npm run dev -- <command>
```

1. Run command `...`
2. Input parameters `...`
3. See error/issue `...`

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g. Ubuntu 22.04, Windows 11]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.x, 22.x]
- Stellar API Inspector version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

```
Paste any relevant log output or error stack trace here
```
